section_text_parts: Notice that, in this case, the item that would be taken from the body is optional. As it has a None default value.
tutorial/body-multiple-params::section-0.section_text: Notice that, in this case, the item that would be taken from the body is optional. As it has a None default value.

section_text_parts: Notice that even though the item was declared the same way as before, it is now expected to be inside of the body with a key item .
tutorial/body-multiple-params::section-0.section_text: Notice that even though the item was declared the same way as before, it is now expected to be inside of the body with a key item .

section_text_parts: Body also has all the same extra validation and metadata parameters as Query , Path and others you will see later.
